name: Fried Green Tomatoes with Milk Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the bacon grease in a heavy frying pan.
2. Dip each tomato slice in the beaten eggs, then coat with flour.
3. Slowly fry the coated tomatoes in the bacon grease until they are golden brown on both sides. Remove them from the pan and set aside on a plate.
4. In the remaining bacon grease, stir in 1 tablespoon of flour, then add 1 cup of warm milk. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens.
5. Add salt and pepper to taste.
6. Pour the gravy over the fried tomatoes and serve hot.
The best there is.
